reasoning_model_1: Model 1 generates the sentence '快看，那是什么？一闪而过！' with high audio fidelity and clear articulation. The content is accurate. model_comparison: The user explicitly requested '极快速' (extremely fast) speaking speed. Model 2, in contrast, delivered the text at a breakneck speed, eliminating pauses and compressing the duration significantly.
